title: An Act Regarding Public Records Maintained by the Department of Inland Fisheries and Wildlife
last_house_action: 4/8/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/9/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Representative ROBERTS for the Joint Standing Committee on Inland Fisheries and Wildlife pursuant to Resolve 2025, chapter 37, section 6 reports that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE and printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218. Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. On motion by Senator Baldacci of Penobscot REFERRED to Committee on Inland Fisheries and Wildlife, in concurrence.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative ROBERTS of South Berwick, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-986) was READ . On motion of Representative ROBERTS of South Berwick, House Amendment "A" (H-994) to Committee Amendment "A" (H-986) was READ and ADOPTED . Committee Amendment "A" (H-986) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-994) thereto was ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-986) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-994) thereto. Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports READ On motion by Senator BALDACCI of Penobscot the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report ACCEPTED . READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (H-976) READ House Amendment "A" (H-994) to Committee Amendment "A" (H-986) READ and ADOPTED Committee Amendment "A" (H-986) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-994) thereto ADOPTED Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-986) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-994) thereto in concurrence.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
